justification: All pass criteria met: boundaries correct (10 is heavy, 50 is freight), all 5 ACs covered in tests with explicit AC-to-test mapping in acceptance_criteria_coverage, no external dependencies, no features beyond spec, confidence.level >= 85 (99).

observations.text: Boundary values explicitly tested with 9.99 and 49.99 confirming correct inclusive lower-boundary semantics
Guard clause correctly handles both weight <= 0 and weight > 1000
No deviations or escalations reported — strict spec adherence
WeightClass union type adds compile-time safety without introducing external dependencies
Assumptions about upper bound (1000 kg) and negative weights are reasonable and documented
